headline: Trump Has Spent 0.6% of His $401 Million Super PAC to Boost GOP
summary: (Bloomberg) -- President Donald Trump’s super political action committee is sitting on $401 million in cash, more than any other super PAC, but has spent just $2.3 million — 0.6% of that total — to help Republicans win elections.Most Read from BloombergYemen’s Houthis to Impose Maritime Blockade on Saudi ArabiaChina AI Sensation Moonshot’s Gamble on Big Models Pays OffTrump Vows 50% Tariff on Canadian Goods Using Depression-Era LawMoonshot’s Kimi K3 May Be More About Memory Than ComputeUS Strike

content.title: Trump Has Spent 0.6% of His $401 Million Super PAC to Boost GOP
